records.ety: [L. stertere to snore: cf. F. stertoreux.]

defs: Characterized by a deep snoring, which accompanies inspiration in some diseases, especially apoplexy; hence, hoarsely breathing; snoring.
quotes: Burning, stertorous breath that hurt her cheek.
The day has ebbed away, and it is night in his room, before his stertorous breathing lulls.
